'''napudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:gradualist|gradualist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-p-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gradualist|gradualist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| napudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næpidhith|næpidhith]] || [[word:næpidhij|næpidhij]] || [[word:næpidhish|næpidhish]] || [[word:næpidhi|næpidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:napupudhuth|napupudhuth]] || [[word:napupudhuj|napupudhuj]] || [[word:napupudhush|napupudhush]] || [[word:napupudhu|napupudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:napudhuth|napudhuth]] || [[word:napudhuj|napudhuj]] || [[word:napudhush|napudhush]] || [[word:napudhu|napudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:napufdhuth|napufdhuth]] || [[word:napufdhuj|napufdhuj]] || [[word:napufdhush|napufdhush]] || [[word:napufdhuf|napufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:napudhuthu|napudhuthu]] || [[word:napudhuju|napudhuju]] || [[word:napudhushu|napudhushu]] || [[word:napudhuku|napudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:napudhuth|napudhuth]] || [[word:napudhuj|napudhuj]] || [[word:napudhush|napudhush]] || [[word:napudhu|napudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:napudhuthul|napudhuthul]] || [[word:napudhujul|napudhujul]] || [[word:napudhushul|napudhushul]] || [[word:napudhukul|napudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:napudhuthuthu|napudhuthuthu]] || [[word:napudhujuju|napudhujuju]] || [[word:napudhushushu|napudhushushu]] || [[word:napudhuku|napudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:napudhuthun|napudhuthun]] || [[word:napudhujun|napudhujun]] || [[word:napudhushun|napudhushun]] || [[word:napudhukun|napudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:napudhuthuoro|napudhuthuoro]] || [[word:napudhujuoro|napudhujuoro]] || [[word:napudhushuoro|napudhushuoro]] || [[word:napudhukuoro|napudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
